brand.name: Business Digest
brand.tagline: Three moves. Every Saturday. Zero noise.
brand.mission: Deliver actionable business intelligence to time-poor professionals through narrative-driven analysis.

audience.psychographics: Time-poor, value-sensitive, distrust hype, seek repeatable frameworks

voice.tone: Direct, authoritative, conversational. A senior colleague sharing battle-tested insight.
rules: Zero adjectives unless they carry semantic weight.
Active voice exclusively. 'The CEO decided' NOT 'The decision was made by the CEO'.
One idea per paragraph. A new idea requires a new paragraph.
Every 90 seconds of a video: a rhetorical question or micro-cliffhanger.
Forbidden phrases: 'in today's world', 'it's important to note', 'game-changing', 'disruptive', 'revolutionary'.
Open with the most interesting moment. Never with background or context.
Close with one actionable takeaway that applies within 24 hours.

visual.thumbnail_style: Dark background, bold single word headline, accent color underline
